summary_en: ¥2.0B upper limit, 1.30M shares (3.17% of outstanding), execution period 2026-05-15 to 2027-04-30, open-market acquisition of common stock.
title_en: Notice regarding determination of matters relating to acquisition of treasury stock (acquisition of treasury stock under Article 165, paragraph 2 of the Companies Act based on articles of incorporation)
translation_en_brief: Bando Chemical Industries announced on 2026-05-14 a board resolution to acquire treasury stock. The company will purchase up to 1.30 million ordinary shares (representing 3.17% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for an upper limit of ¥2.0 billion. The acquisition period runs from 2026-05-15 through 2027-04-30. The stated rationale is to execute flexible capital policy in response to changes in the business environment and as part of shareholder return measures. As of 2026-03-31, the company held 3.16 million treasury shares against 41.06 million shares outstanding (excluding treasury).
